FIELD 'OUTSTANDING PAYMENTS NUMBER' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
solution: The Outstanding Payments Number represents the number of outstanding payments (remaining installments). It will include any overdue installment if known. In some cases, this number could contain an overdue installment even if it was not yet known at the date of data extraction, due to some grace period for the payment. The format of the number should be Integer: no decimal, no comma/s, and no dot/s. And the length of the integer must not be greater than 3 digits. There are 1,185 occurrences for this error, kindly check and correct.

description: FIELD 'OUTSTANDING BALANCE' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT

description: FIELD 'OVERDUEPAYMENTS NUMBER' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
solution: The Overdue Payments Number represents the number of overdue payments including the number of installments for which the SE is certain that the customer/client missed its payment in reference to the contract with the SE (i.e. after also grace period is expired). The format for the value should be whole numbers only (integer without the decimal), no commas and no dot. The length of the Overdue Payments Number should not be greater than 3 digits.

description: FIELD 'OVERDUEPAYMENTS AMOUNT' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
solution: This field represents the overdue balance (amount of overdue installments). It includes any interest or fee accrued on the amount if applied.

solution: Note that the record types accepted by the CIS are HD, ID, BD, CI, CN, CC, CS, SL, NE, and FT only. Other than these including excess rows/carriage returns will result in such error. rephrased_fix: This error means that you have placed an invalid Record Type. Please note of the following record types that are only known by the system:

description: FILE SPECIFIED DOES NOT EXIST
rephrased_fix: No file of such filename exists.

description: NUMBER OF FIELDS IS NOT VALID FOR THE SPECIFIED 'RECORD TYPE'
solution: Each record type has a specific number of fields, as listed below. The pipelines in the report represent the fields, which means a missing pipeline is a missing field. Pipelines can be more than the specified but cannot be less. Please double check as well if there are columns that are hidden and unhide it.

description: NUMBER OF RECORDS BETWEEN HEADER AND FOOTER IS NOT VALID
solution: Assuming that a contribution file consists of 50 records/rows, excluding the Header and the Footer from the count, the 'Number of Records' should be equal to "48". This error is also related to Errors 30-009 and 30-014.
rephrased_fix: Assuming that a contribution file consists of 50 records/rows, excluding the Header and the Footer from the count, the 'Number of Records' should be equal to "48".

FILE SPECIFIED IS EMPTY

solution: CHAR IS PRESENT, occurs if there are special characters (,.-/ñ, etc.) in fields that only accept alphanumeric characters or if the file is not properly converted into UTF-8 without Byte Order Mark (BOM) before saving the file as a text (.txt) file.
rephrased_fix: error occurs if there are special characters (,.-/ etc.) in fields that only accept alphanumeric characters or if the file is not properly converted into UTF8 without BOM before saving it as a text (.txt) file. You may check the detailed result in your FTP folder's Submission/Output for the specific row numbers of records that encountered this error. Please make sure that there are no special characters in the fields like Monthly Payment Amount, Financed Amount, etc. Please make sure as well that you have selected "Convert to UTF-8" in the Encoding tab in Notepad++ before saving your file into text (TXT.)

description: THE FILE CANNOT BE PROCESSED
rephrased_fix:
The possible reason/s for this error are as follows:

1. Wrong filename - the format of the file name should be (ProviderCode_CSDF_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS) 
2. Wrong file type - the required extension of the file should be .zip.gpg only
3. Wrong data format - the file should be converted to UTF-8 (Encoding >> Convert to UTF-8 in Notepad++) before compressing it
4. Wrong encryption key - the encryption key you are using is expired or you are using the encryption key for UAT
